title: Wall Mount Guitar Holder
summary: This simple wall mount guitar holder is perfect for displaying your guitars without taking up floor space.
description: This simple wall mount guitar holder is perfect for displaying your guitars without taking up floor space. Simple design means they look rad even if theres no guitar hung.

steps.title: Plans
steps.body: These plans illustrate the sizing and cuts for each piece in the holder.

steps.title: Cut Wood
steps.body: Cut the board (I used maple) into two pieces, one 5 1/2" and one 4 1/2"

steps.title: Drill Pocket Holes
steps.body: Drill two pocket holes according to Kreg Jig directions in the longer piece of wood as shown in plans.

steps.title: Cut Guitar Neck Hold
steps.body: Use a jigsaw or scroll saw to cut a space for your guitar neck. Cut according to the size of your guitar, making it no larger than the bottom of the headstock.

steps.title: Attach Wood Pieces
steps.body: Use the pocket hole screws and attach the two pieces of wood as shown.

steps.title: Sand, Stain, Seal
steps.body: Sand, stain and seal your guitar holders. I used Ebony stain and a satin poly.

steps.title: Mount to wall
steps.body: Using wall anchors if necessary, sink two screws through the top half of the wall mount into the wall.
